_description: System health snapshot for Rinq. Updated by memory-updater agent at end of sessions.
_notes: 2026-04-17 (afternoon/evening): Twelve commits shipped. Transfer UX overhaul — migration 073 adds transfer_failure_reason, server-side DND check, persistent #callNotice banner (old #transferError was invisible inside closed modal). Reports correctness — 'transferred' now counted as answered in 12 SQL sites (call_log_mixin.py). Huge SIP bug fixed: close_stale_calls now populates talk_seconds (was leaving NULL; Watson DB backfilled 422 rows). Leaderboard relabel 'Most Calls Handled'. PWA manifest uses tenant product_name. Caller-ID fallback for REST-API Client destinations.

recent_commits: c4e68fa Clarify Queue Alerts vs DND toggles with underneath labels
4a1b607 Check DND before transfer and surface failures persistently
931753b Populate talk_seconds when closing stale call_log entries
39deb0a Align inbound and outbound agent tables with fixed column widths
b3b1c71 Make inbound and outbound agent tables consistent
38b81a2 Simplify inbound agent table to just Calls and Talk Time
26a1c8c Count transferred calls as answered in reports
081e631 Relabel leaderboard as Most Calls Handled and fix inbound fallback
f234511 Fall back to server lookup when incoming call From is missing
b18a79e Show specific reason when a warm transfer fails
36c232f Use tenant product_name in PWA manifest

migrations.notes: 073 adds transfer_failure_reason TEXT to queued_calls and call_log. 072 enables voicemail escape defaults on existing queues.

watson.notes: Production. Address book synced from Peter daily 2am. talk_seconds backfill ran 2026-04-17 (422 rows).

derek.notes: Personal/test. Address book sync no-ops (no Peter).

tests.notes: End-user test plan for 2026-04-17 changes: leaderboard label, reports inbound/outbound parity, desk-phone talk time, caller-ID resolution for extension-directory calls, transfer failure messages, DND rejection, header toggle labels.

known_issues: Missed-call attribution on inbound agent table — impossible without ring_attempts (purges after 24h); Missed column dropped from UI for now
Consult-status callback runs _unhold_and_rejoin_agent salvage even after clean Cancel (transfer_status='cancelled') — noisy but harmless
phone.html ~5,100 lines with 109 inline JS functions — refactor deferred, fits with frontend feature work
api/routes.py ~5,100 lines — deeper service extraction (RingService, CallRoutingService, VoicemailService) deferred until automated tests exist
database/db.py 3,528 lines — more mixin extractions possible (recordings, staff, participants, queues)
transfer_service.py has ~400 lines of duplication between queue-based and universal transfer methods
7 bare except clauses in transfer_service.py — should at minimum log at debug
No automated tests — all testing via /admin/test-runsheet
DND + empty queue hangs up instead of falling through to voicemail
Internal caller ID shows extension number, not agent name
Transfer modal doesn't auto-close when target answers
Call-ended vs not-answered distinction wrong for conference hangups
'On call' status lingers ~5-10s after transfer (Twilio cache lag)
Voicemail offered even when no destination configured
Per-tenant Twilio config: creds still in .env, should move to tenant-only
Watson tenant uses master Twilio account, should migrate to subaccount
Static files (ringback, hold music) not in git — copied manually during deployment
show_in_pam is a legacy Peter-only flag — removed from home-page UI 2026-04-14 but column still exists and is read by /staff-phones
queue_connect_agent endpoint (~line 2136 routes.py) still uses <Dial><Queue> not conference-based — investigate if legacy/unused
